description: A Federal Protective Service (FPS/DHS) title card / publication-promo graphic in square format on a deep navy-blue background. The upper portion presents the DHS seal inside a tilted white parallelogram badge at left, with white text to the right reading 'Personal Safety & Security' in a lighter weight above a very large bold white all-caps headline 'YOUR SAFETY OUR PRIORITY.' A white horizontal band separates the top from a bottom footer. The footer features a blue-and-green diagonal-stripe motif with the bold 'FPS' wordmark (and small 'FEDERAL PROTECTIVE SERVICE' lettering plus a small DHS badge) at left; to the right, white text gives campaign references with small globe/phone icons: 'Your Safety, Our Priority.' / 'DHS.gov/Publication/YourSafetyOurPriority' / '#YourSafetyOurPriority' and 'Federal Protective Service' / 'DHS.gov/FPS' / 'Social media @FPSDHS'. There is no photography.
notable_text: Personal Safety & Security; YOUR SAFETY OUR PRIORITY; #YourSafetyOurPriority; DHS.gov/FPS; @FPSDHS
